name: Dasatinib plus quercetin
summary: Senolytic combination tracked primarily under cellular senescence, with an adjacent mouse telomere-dysfunction finding in the current public record.
mechanism_summary: Combines a tyrosine kinase inhibitor and flavonoid to preferentially clear some senescent-cell populations.

open_questions: Which senescent-cell populations are beneficial to clear in each tissue context
Whether telomere-dysfunction changes reflect capping repair or removal of damaged endothelial cells
